title: Spicy Creamy Garlic Braised with Saucy Bhuna and Sauerkraut
description: This rich, spicy, creamy dish combines elements of Australian comfort food with a twist of South Asian cuisine. Perfect for date nights, it features the comforting flavors of garlic, sauerkraut, and a hint of bhuna spice.

ingredients.name: Sauerkraut (Serving size: 1 cup)
ingredients.amount: 2 cups fresh or frozen, rinsed and drained
ingredients.notes: For added flavor, add some dried red chili flakes to the sauerkraut before use.

ingredients.name: Garlic Puree (3 cloves of garlic, minced)
Tomato Paste
ingredients.notes: Use a good quality tomato paste for best results

ingredients.name: Sesame Oil (or any mild flavored oil)
Freshly Ground Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: Add to taste for heat, but keep in mind the already spicy bhuna masala.

ingredients.name: Red Chilli Flakes (for garnish and flavor enhancement)

instructions: Heat coconut milk in a large pot over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
Add garlic puree, tomato paste, sauerkraut, sesame oil, and freshly ground black pepper. Stir well to combine all ingredients together.
Simmer for about 15 minutes until the flavors are fully infused into the dish.
Pour in sour cream if using and stir gently to ensure it melts evenly with other ingredients.
Serve hot garnished with a sprinkle of red chilli flakes on top, along with crusty bread or rice.
